title: scrollBehavior demo
description: Long page for testing scroll when switching locale with $switchLocale. Scroll to the switcher in the middle, then change language.
meta_hint: SwitchLocalePreserve + scrollToTop: false. Mark switch targets with data-locale — clicks are handled by the wrapper.
filler: Short English text — page height is smaller in this locale.
switcher_hint: Click a locale — the button should stay under the cursor after switch (even when block height changes).
